Light weight Monocular Slam

Motion Approximation From Optical Flow

About the Project

The use of computer vision has skyrocketed over the past few decades, especially for motion analysis. For this project, I demonstrated the use of vision processing techniques to estimate the state of a mobile robot(Magni).

The following were the constraints and requirements

  • Light weight to run on a RPI3
  • Vision Processing in C++
  • ROS compatible
  • EKF fussion with Encoder and IMU data

Skills Involved

  • OpenCV
  • Vision Processing in C++
  • Optical flow
  • Motion tracking
  • Camera calibration
  • Visual odometry methods
  • Camera stabilization techniques
  • Structure from motion
  • 3D reconstruction from stereo

Procedure
